title: [FIRRTL] Can not canonicalize away memories without more care

features.name: memory with readwriter port and repl-seq-mem flag
features.description: Code should include a memory with readwriter port and use the repl-seq-mem compilation flag which requires memory preservation rather than optimization
features.snippet:
mem mem:
  data-type => UInt<8>
  depth => 1
  readwriter => rw
  read-latency => 1
  write-latency => 1
  read-under-write => undefined

connect mem.rw.clk, clk
connect mem.rw.en, en
connect mem.rw.addr, addr
connect mem.rw.wmode, mode
connect mem.rw.wmask, UInt<8>(-1)
connect mem.rw.wdata, wdata
connect rdata, mem.rw.rdata
